title: User Login
steps: Given the user is on the login page
When the user enters valid credentials
Then the user should be redirected to the dashboard
And a welcome message should be displayed

title: Add Item to Cart
steps: Given the user is browsing the product catalogue
When the user clicks Add to Cart on a product
Then the cart count should increase by one
And the product should appear in the cart

title: User Logout
steps: Given the user is logged in
When the user clicks the logout button
Then the session should be cleared
And the user should be redirected to the login page

title: Password Reset
steps: Given the user has forgotten their password
When the user submits their email address
Then a reset link should be sent to the email
And the link should expire after 24 hours

title: Search Results
steps: Given the user is on the search page
When the user types a query and clicks Submit
Then a list of matching results should be displayed
But no results should show if the query is empty

title: Checkout Flow
steps: Given the user has items in their cart
When the user proceeds to checkout
Then the order summary should be shown
And the user should be able to confirm the order
